message:
bd-37a.5: E-process throttle observability layer

Add tracing spans, structured logs, and monotonic counter to the
e-process anytime-valid sequential testing module:

- TRACING: span 'eprocess.update' with test_id, wealth_current,
  wealth_threshold, observation_count, rejected fields
- LOG: DEBUG for every wealth update with eprocess_wealth gauge,
  INFO when e-process rejects (significant finding) or hard deadline
  forces recompute
- METRICS: static atomic counter eprocess_rejections_total with
  public accessor, re-exported from ftui_runtime root
- 10 new inline tests: span field assertions (2), DEBUG log (1),
  INFO log (2), counter verification (2), per-observation events (1)

All 41 eprocess_throttle tests pass (31 existing + 10 new).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
